actions.value:
When using Thorchain products, like ThorSwap or Savers, there's a "dust threshold" that's baked into the smart contract. For example, to start a BTC stake, anything below 20,000 satoshi (or .0002 BTC) will not be successful.
 

For more information on this:
https://dev.thorchain.org/saving-guide/quickstart-guide.html#basic-mechanics

 

Please forward any details about the transaction in question, and we'll have a look to see what can be done in this case.
